title: cichorium intybus subsp. sativum
intro: Cichorium intybus subsp. sativum, also known as wild endive or succory, is a subspecies of the Cichorium intybus plant, which is an annual or biennial herbaceous plant of the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues due to its inulin and anthocyanin content. The health benefits of Cichorium intybus subsp. sativum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve blood sugar regulation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
